subject: Where is JEE ????
body:
figured you might have been off with MATT LAUER !  
For me, I am home -  no brace   !  - lots of  limitations but supposed to 
walk  , walk, walk  . Looking  to  get a pedometer just so I can compete with 
myself as things a bit  boring and it is so awfully hot here.
 
My 1st go-back mid June and I can't wait other than the discomfort in  flying.
 
Major concerned about one bump on the top of where the rods would be -maybe  
Bruce can e-mail  photo bcs.  you will freak at what is in  me.   More than 
amazing.
 
How are you ?  Give me a clue .   Did you truly get to the  WALL ??  You are 
in my prayers.
 
marsh 
 
 
Marcia  M.

body_html:
figured you might have been off with MATT LAUER ! 
For me, I am home -  no brace   !  - lots of limitations but supposed to walk  , walk, walk  . Looking to  get a pedometer just so I can compete with myself as things a bit boring and it is so awfully hot here.
 
My 1st go-back mid June and I can't wait other than the discomfort in flying.
 
Major concerned about one bump on the top of where the rods would be -maybe Bruce can e-mail  photo bcs.  you will freak at what is in me.   More than amazing.
 
How are you ?  Give me a clue .   Did you truly get to the WALL ??  You are in my prayers.
 
marsh
 
 
Marcia M.
